sales_page_raw: Practical Deep Learning for Coders by Jeremy Howard. Learn PyTorch and deep learning. Price: $0 (completely free). Syllabus covers neural networks, computer vision, NLP, and collaborative filtering.

youtube_search.title: Practical Deep Learning for Coders course playlist
youtube_search.description: Full deep learning course covering PyTorch and fast.ai library.

transcripts.fastai_vid_1: Welcome to Practical Deep Learning for Coders. This is lesson 1. We will build an image classifier. The notebooks are available on Kaggle and GitHub for free.

web_search.title: Jeremy Howard - fast.ai Founder and Kaggle Grandmaster
web_search.snippet: Jeremy Howard is a researcher, developer, and founder of fast.ai, formerly President and Chief Scientist at Kaggle.
